Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: token-based authentication (#74)

feat: token-based authentication for daemon connections

Daemon generates a UUID token on startup, writes it to <socket>.token
with 0600 permissions. Clients must authenticate as their first message.
Token is auto-read from the token file, or can be provided via --token
flag or VEX_TOKEN env var for remote/port-forwarded connections.

commit.message:
Revert pre-commit pytest hook to uv run pytest

The previous fix hardcoded .venv/bin/python which is not portable.
The actual issue was broken shebangs in .venv/bin/ scripts (pointing to
a non-existent parent venv path). Reinstalled pytest and pre-commit in
the venv to fix the shebangs; uv run pytest now works correctly.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

commit.message:
feat: enterprise-grade live macro data service with intelligent caching

Replace all hardcoded macro indicators with live API fetches from
authoritative sources. Multi-source fallback chains ensure reliability:
  USD/INR: FRED DEXINUS → Frankfurter → Open ExchangeRate API
  Bond 10Y: FRED INDIRLTLT01STM
  Repo Rate: API Ninjas → World Bank
  CPI: API Ninjas → World Bank
  GDP: World Bank → FRED
  Hotel Supply: HVS (manual; no free API)

TTL-based caching: FX 15min, bonds 1hr, repo 24hr, CPI 7d, GDP 30d.
Stale-while-revalidate pattern serves stale data while refreshing.
Emergency fallbacks only used if ALL sources AND cache fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.description: V3 Grand Madurai – Real Estate Investment Lifecycle Platform

commit.message:
feat(server): add Valkey for distributed rate limiting (#690)

## What
Add optional Valkey (Redis-compatible) support for distributed rate
limiting across control-plane instances. Includes threat model updates,
env docs, and spec consolidation.

## Why
Per-instance rate limiting (governor crate) doesn't coordinate across
multiple control-plane instances behind a load balancer. With N
instances, clients get N× the intended budget per IP. Valkey provides
shared sliding-window counters.

## How
- **`crates/server/src/valkey.rs`**: ValkeyClient wrapper using `fred`
v10 with Lua-scripted sliding-window rate limiting
- **`crates/server/src/auth/rate_limit.rs`**: Dual-backend
`AuthRateLimiter` — in-memory (governor) when `VALKEY_URL` unset, Valkey
when set
- **Fail-open**: Valkey errors allow requests (availability >
strictness)
- **Infrastructure**: Added to docker-compose, services.sh,
no-docker-setup scripts
- **Specs**: Renamed `redis-requirements.md` → `cache.md` (slimmed from
163 to 93 lines)
- **Threat model**: Updated TM-AUTH-001 to MITIGATED, added TM-DOS-009
(Valkey network exposure) and TM-DOS-010 (fail-open design)
- **Env docs**: Added `VALKEY_URL` documentation

## Risk
- **Low** — Valkey is entirely optional. Without `VALKEY_URL`, behavior
is identical to before (in-memory governor).
- DEV_MODE does not require Valkey (smoke tested).
- Fail-open design means Valkey downtime = degraded rate limiting, not
service outage.

## Checklist
- [x] Tests added or updated (7 rate limit unit tests, URL parsing test)
- [x] Backward compatibility considered (fully backward compatible —
Valkey is opt-in)
- [x] Threat model updated (TM-AUTH-001, TM-DOS-009, TM-DOS-010)
- [x] Environment variables documented
- [x] Specs updated and consolidated
- [x] Smoke tested DEV_MODE without Valkey

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: physics-based blob animation + organic shapes + connection lines

- ThemeBubbleMap: replace CSS float animations with requestAnimationFrame
  physics simulation (spring-to-home, blob-blob repulsion, mouse repulsion,
  organic random walk). Positions applied via direct DOM transforms at 60fps
  without triggering React re-renders.
- Canvas overlay draws proximity-based connection lines each frame: thicker
  lines between same-lever-category blobs (max 310px), thin lines between
  any blobs within 165px — fades by distance.
- Mouse cursor repels nearby blobs (radius 190px) for interactive feel.
- circlePacking: increase blob wobble from 0.22→0.42 and numPoints 8→10,
  reduce Catmull-Rom tension 0.30→0.22 — produces true amoeba-like shapes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Normalize math expressions before AI comparison to fix LaTeX vs plain text

Added normalizeMathExpression() that strips LaTeX commands (\cdot, \times,
\frac, etc.), normalizes operators, removes whitespace, and lowercases.
Both the rubric and student answer are normalized and included in the
prompt so the AI can easily see equivalence (e.g., "a=m*n" vs "m*n=a").

commit.message:
Security hardening, single-owner auth, CLI package, Gemini 3 Flash

- Remove OpenAI/GLM providers, keep Claude (default), Gemini, Stark Protocol
- Lock registration after first user (single-owner system)
- Add /auth/setup-status endpoint for CLI auto-detection
- Security headers middleware (HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.)
- Login brute-force protection (5 attempts = 15min lockout via Redis)
- Auto-generate secure JWT_SECRET_KEY and AES_KEY if not configured
- Startup validation refuses to boot with insecure defaults in production
- Disable Swagger/ReDoc in production (DEBUG=false)
- Tighten CORS (explicit methods/headers)
- AES-256 message encryption at rest with per-user PBKDF2 keys
- CLI package (stark-jarvis) with System Handshake Token auth
- Update Gemini default model to gemini-3-flash
- Path traversal hardening on SPA static serving

commit.message:
fix(config,grpc): R245 Sprint 2 — OPA SSRF + GrpcConfig validation

R245-CFG-1 (MEDIUM): OPA endpoint cloud metadata SSRF defense.
Reject 169.254.x.x (link-local) and metadata.google.internal in OPA
endpoint URL. Localhost remains allowed since OPA is typically a sidecar.
3 new tests.

R245-GRPC-1 (MEDIUM): Add GrpcConfig::validate() with bounds on
max_message_size [1, 256MB] and SSRF + dangerous char validation on
upstream_grpc_url. Called in start_grpc_server() before use.

R245-GRPC-2 (LOW): upstream_grpc_url validated with has_dangerous_chars()
to prevent control character injection in logs and policy matching.
5 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add Dockerfile to bypass Railpack secret scanning

Railpack scans process.env.* references and treats them as required
build secrets. A Dockerfile tells Railway to use Docker builder instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复 AI 视频分析器拖动 —— 采用 tldraw 正确的 pointer-events 模式

tldraw 设计模式：HTMLContainer 默认 CSS 为 pointer-events:none
事件穿透 HTML 层，直达 tldraw 的 SVG/canvas 层，由 tldraw 的
getShapeAtPoint() 做命中检测并处理拖动。

之前错误做法：style={{ pointerEvents: 'all' }} 让 HTML 内容截获所有
事件并冒泡到 canvas，tldraw 识别为"HTML 内容事件"而非"shape 拖动"。

此次修复：
- HTMLContainer 移除 style 覆盖，恢复 CSS 默认 pointer-events:none
- 拖动条、状态卡 → pointer-events:none → 事件穿透 → tldraw 正确处理拖动
- 滚动内容 → pointer-events:auto（已有）→ 可滚动，stopProp 防止误触拖动
- 按钮 → 新增 pointerEvents:'auto' → 可点击，stopProp 防止误触拖动

验证：getShapeAtPoint 在拖动条位置命中 ai_video_analyzer，
editor.dispatch 模拟拖动确认 shape 从 (-2,105) 移至 (118,217)。
